title: Polystachya macrantha
taxonomy: Polystachya macrantha is classified in the kingdom Plantae, specifically within the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. This species falls under the genus Polystachya, which is a group of terrestrial orchids. Within the genus, Polystachya macrantha is further categorized as a species due to its distinct characteristics. The classification also includes its order Asparagales and division Magnoliophyta, indicating its evolutionary relationships within the plant kingdom.
